title: hedeomoides serpylloides
intro: Hedeomoides serpylloides, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of creeping thyme include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. Creeping thyme can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb to be used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
